reviews.text:
I was involved in a serious vehicle accident and the next day I was notified I had warrants out for my arrest for 3 alleged First degree felonies along with 3 alleged Class a misdemeanors. My warrants had no bond amounts listed. I voluntarily turned my self in to jail. Annie and Kenneth worked thru the holidays and sacrificed time with their family and kids to get a bond reduction. The bond reduction was a success and I was out of jail. During the entire time of my case they went above and beyond to fight for my innocence as well as keeping me calm and stress free. Annie and Kenneth never stopped fighting for me and standing by my side. The out come of my alleged offense went above and beyond my expectations! I’m a father and my child is 2yrs old. Without Biggs & Greenslade i wouldn’t have seen my son for decades if convicted.
I owe them my life. I will never forget them and the fight they never stopped fighting for me.
Due to their hard work and attention to detail and being the best attorneys I have never known. I am now a free man with a great career! And my son still has his father by his side.

Do not second guess hiring B&G law. Had I not hired them I would be in state jail over an alleged crime I did not commit for a very long time.

Annie & Kenneth I still to this day cannot thank you both enough for proving my innocence. You both literally saved my life. I will never forget yall.

reviews.text: Ron and Jan made a very difficult experience so much better. They worked on my case for nearly two years, showing dedication and commitment every step of the way. Throughout the process, they were not only professional but also incredibly personable, which made a huge difference. I highly recommend them to anyone in need of compassionate and capable representation.

I had a great experience with Vickery Law Firm! They took the time to explain everything to me clearly and made the entire process stress-free. Their dedication and expertise helped me secure a settlement that was even more than I expected. I highly recommend them to anyone in need of legal assistance!

WOW!!! Not many places make you feel like a friend, but they sure do here. They take the time to explain the details personally, answer calls without an automated system and Friendly welcoming atmosphere. I will be calling them in the future if services are needed again.

Jan & Ron are amazing. Jan is always pleasant and keeps me up to date on whatever Ron needs or is doing. Ron is a no-nonsense type of guy and dies what he says. I'm not a lawyer. He is. He fights the battles you don't want to or can't. Outstanding in every aspect.

I would recommend Vickery Law Firm to anyone.  Both Jan and Ron have been a constant support for me as we battled a case for years.  My case actually was indeed a brutal situation and instead of just "Quitting" Ron, threw his shoulders back and leaned in hard for me and pursued my case all the way through the appeals process, and not only did we Win in the Appeals Court, but because Ron Vickery's Arguments were so Profound and Written so eloquently the Appeals Court ordered additional provisions given to our Plead.  The other side settled immediately.  His fees are VERY FAIR!!!  This firm is the epitome of Righteous Justice, and the Benchmark of What Real Legal Representation should be.  They don't hide if you call, they don't avoid emails, I have never waited more than 1 hour for a response of any kind.  Try and find Lawyers that actually answer the phones or emails, because they are far and few between.  You will be treated like the most important CLIENT when you work with Vickery Law Firm.  They are Warm and personable, understanding and compassionate, they put the word "Counselor of Law" back into its true Context.  They truly counsel you and listen to all the background noise that goes with Injury Cases, and the ups and downs from physical distress to financial struggles.  I live in Austin but did make the drive to Vickery Law Office in Tyler to sign final papers and when i got there i was greeted with the Biggest Hug from Jan, and a nice Fatherly Hug from Ron.  I felt like I had just met "old friends".  My case never intended to Yield much financial profit, but that never swayed Ron Vickery, he treated me as if I was the most important appt on his calendar.  That really matters when it seems like the world is closing in on you during Personal Injury matters.  I encourage anyone that has questions about Personal Injury, or need to hire Counsel, to Call Vickery Law Firm and ask for Jan.  You will be met with a Warm southern Hello, and respect and kindness, and that experience will carry through the entire process.  Thank you, Jan and Ron, for all you did for me and my family.  I will forever be in your debt.

Sincerely,
Leslie G
Austin Texas

I can't say enough about this firm. Both Jan and Ron are amazing individuals who put in their research and effort. They go a step above and have checked in on me to see how I was fairing mentally with the weight of the lawsuit. I've always been given time for breaks if needed. Despite my head injury, they have been patient with me if I ever become fixated on a subject and redirected me in the kindest of manners.

Every step of the way, they have been there for me. Whether it was prepping me for a deposition, or helping me reschedule due to events related to being a single mother.

This firm is the real deal. I didn't feel scammed and all negotiations in terms or how things would play out were open table.

I pray the best for this company and for Ron and Jan. They deserve it.
Super nice people. And worth the wait on getting my claim handled. Keep up the great work. 👍 👍
The staff at this firm is great to work with & was very helpful
Jan is super friendly and knowledgeable. Should have been my first choice. Highly recommend.

I was treated great. They did a wonderful job.

this firm is awesome. the staff took great care of my daughter and they are very concerned about the people they help. I  will recommend this firm to anyone needing help.

reviews.text: I am very grateful my case was very  Difficult Ron was up front and told me that it was going to take time Ron and Jan keep me updated step by step it did take time but I also understood that my case was not going to be easy and what also did not help covid stated in the middle of my case so that did not help either but the end result was positive more than I was expecting so thanks agen Ron and Jan for your help God bless

Ron is very personable and did everything he could to explain anything I did not understand and went to work hard for me with my claim. Omg!!! They were so amazing and nice I love love love  Jan Seal she greeted me with the biggest smile on her face!!! I love how they took care of me and Ron Vickery is so amazing I will always go to them with whatever I need from now on!! ❤️ Thank you guys for everything!!!!

mother had asked for. Ron and Jan are wonderful people and they both work very hard to accommodate their clients. I would recommend them to anyone in need of a good Law Firm and I would not hesitate to use them again.

Word of mouth carries heavy weight in most exchanges of business in East Texas.  Mr. Vickery came highly recommended as a man of solid moral and intellect. I was more than pleased that during our exchanges I was patiently guided through a process that I was unfamiliar with while receiving timely and informative updates throughout a process that most would consider confusing and insufficient of convenience. Ms. Jan, his legal assistant, was wonderful with communication since day one and sets a high standard for service and efficiency.   Mr. Vickery was sincere and attentive; completely dissolving my predispositions of how our meetings would be conducted. -He is after all an attorney.  Never could I have predicted his calm and warm demeanor or his subtle confidence.   I felt very at ease with him at the helm of my matter.  Let me encourage anyone who is seeking legal assistance to call on the office of Ron Vickery.  I feel that after my encounter, my recommendation is worth offering to others.

Ron and Mrs. Jan are a powerhouse duo.  Their generosity, guidance, and moral value, didn't just have a legal impact, but also, so much on a personal spiritual level.  Walking into the firm's office for the first time, I was unsure, lacking hope, appearing unconfident.  Mrs. Jan came around the corner with her sweet smile, greeted me, and I immediately felt a warm embrace and assurance that everything will be alright.  While I sat in the waiting room,  I noticed that  the firm is very busy, as Mrs. Jan seemed constantly on the move, answering  phone calls with an enthusiastic and pleasant greeting, and completing  all other sorts of multi tasks.  Ron is very professional, knowledgeable in many legal aspects and down to earth.  His generosity, leaves me feeling forever indebted to him.  Ron is not in it for the riches, he is morally just in a society that sometimes forgets it's ethics.  My family and I can't thank Ron and Mrs. Jan enough, for everything that they have done.

Thanks for being a great firm handling my case. I would like to especially thank Jan for everything from keeping me informed!  Being extremely nice, understanding through out the process of my case.. No one wants to ever need any attorney but thank you guys for being patient and fighting for me.

Surgeries, physical therapy, pain management and prescriptions. In the end I still received compensation somehow and they also worked with my medical debts reducing them significantly. If I should ever need help again I would return to them. They also were very friendly and accommodating. Thank you Vickery Law Firm for your outstanding service.

Update: they responded and they are liars. Obviously they aren’t going to log a call where I was treated poorly. This firm is trash just like their weak response
reviews.ownerResponse: Mr. Shipp, I just saw your review on my Google listing.  I think you have mistaken my firm for someone else.  My legal assistant logs every telephone call we receive, and we have no record that you called our office.  We pride ourselves in strong customer service, and my legal assistant would never hang up on a potential client.  Feel free to give my office so we can discuss this problem – 903-504-5490.

reviews.text: Brought a lawsuit against me for a minor accident. Rear ended a lady and put me in stress for 2 years.. Forget she walked away and I made a mistake thinking she was going.. I had anxiety attacks regarding this for years.. Combat Vet and they have nothing better to do. And the thing is, the settlement she got, they ended up with the majority of it I'm sure... Sad world we live in
reviews.ownerResponse: Mr. Beebe, I have been reluctant to respond to your negative Google review during the pending litigation.  Due to the actions of your insurance company in failing to reasonably respond to our pre-litigation claim, yes, a lawsuit was filed against you to preserve the claim.  Unfortunately, lawsuits are necessary when insurance companies fail to appropriately defend their insureds during the claims phase.  I appreciate your service to our Country, and I apologize for having to take the necessary step to file the case.  Eventually, your insurance company made a reasonable settlement offer and the case was successfully closed.

reviews.text: The MAN is super. Down to earth Honest. Hard to find this Professionalism in today's world.

reviews.text:
I was involved in an accident in 2016 where I was struck by a drunk driver who left the scene of the accident but later came back. I originally sought out the services of another law firm, that law firm handed my case over to the Flowers Law Firm. At first I was a bit irritated by being juggled around by lawyers, but I soon found out it was the best thing that could have happened.

Donovan Flowers is not like any lawyer I’ve met, and I’ve met quite a few of them, he really cares about his clients, he keeps in contact, he’s always returned a phone call when I’ve left a message, and he gave great council and advice during my case. We closed the case this month July 2018, and most lawyers are about grabbing as much money as they can, Donovan told me he did not believe a lawyer should get a higher percentage of the money than the client, and when the settlement was reached I got a good amount, more than I ever thought, and it’s because of Donovan Flowers.

If the need ever arises and I need legal representation again, The Flowers Law Firm will be my first call. I highly recommend this firm to anyone in need of a good legal advice and/or representation.

He may be the youngest, but he is no doubt, the best, and my favorite. Don’t let an insurance company give you the run around, call Nick. Don't let an 18 wheeler accident get you down, call Nick.  Don’t let the minutiae of litigation depress you, call Nick. That’s right, Nick stands alone on top of Mt. Negem and I can’t recommend him enough.  He will talk you through confusing scenarios, provide a hot cup of comfort, and even lend a hand when you fall backwards out of your chair.  I hope you never need an attorney, but if you find yourself between a rock and a hard place, call the chisel, call Nick.

I give him a review of one. I wish I could have given a review less than one, but one is the lowest allowed.

My experience with attorney Patterson was very disappointing. He represented me and negotiated a plea deal, but it turned out to be a terrible agreement for my situation. At the time, he told me that I would be able to file for a nondisclosure later and get the record sealed or removed. I relied on that advice.

I later learned that the offense included in the plea deal is barred from nondisclosure, which means I can’t seal the record at all. This was extremely upsetting because I would have made different decisions if I had been fully informed of the long-term consequences.

I am sharing this review based on my personal experience so others can be aware and ask more questions before accepting a plea
I was actually out of state and haven’t had my license in over 14 years. He handled my case very quickly and was able to get my license in less than a month! Five stars!!!!!

He emailed me back, then called me and filed for an EIN number with the IRS during our phone conversation. A few minutes later, I had an EIN number in my email from Richard. All at NO charge, I might add. So again, you can see why I highly recommend Richard Patteson to handle your legal issues!

Jonathan is one of the best attorney I have experienced. He took my case when I had no hope anyone will take it. He gave me hope and worked numerous different strategies to get me when I deserve. He has been 💯 honest and upfront with me so far. My case is definitely a special case and he is willing to take it on full force! Love this about him.

We reached out to Jonathan Wharton after being unable to obtain reimbursement r/t a case of medical malpractice. He was always straightforward, honest and professional. Told us exactly what we should expect and was always quick to answer any question that arose. I will always be grateful for his help and will be sure to recommend him in the future.

I promise my words cannot convey the gratitude my family and I have for this anointed attorney, Jonathan Wharton! We had been cheated by and lost a lot of money due to a horrible contractor and an even worse attorney. I had almost given up. I felt like evil was winning, and I felt like I had failed my family. With very little faith, I called a successful attorney office my friend had suggested. That law firm told me that they did not practice that type of law, so they referred me to Jonathan Wharton. The first time I talked to him, he was finishing my sentences. I had been explaining my cry so much, it was refreshing to talk to someone who not only understood where I was coming from, but could state the law to combat the problem with the first conversation. Wharton addressed the “terrible” attorney with knowledge, skill set, and a command that she went days without a response. Then when she did respond, he met her with case law that shut her up! I felt like a kid saying, “My dad is stronger than your dad!” I had not felt this good in two years since the saga began. I found the strength to clean my apartment better, be truly present with my children, I laughed, and then I cried an ugly cry of gratitude. The relief I felt was God sent. The prayers I prayed, and for a stranger to come in and help us when those who I thought I could trust cheated us, helped me learn what trust looks like. I am sure I am going off on a tangent, but the contractor who built my house poorly and did not complete it is a preacher. The horrible attorney I hired was someone I knew from the small town where I graduated. Both failed me significantly. They knew that my husband had just died before our building the house and they knew that I had a child with special needs. Therefore, you would think they would lead with integrity. To this day, I have not physically met Jonathan. I tried him with the little faith I had left, and he led us out of a dark place with his skill set, knowledge, and a true calling for the job. If you want an attorney you can TRUST, who possess the understanding and follow through you expect from a “great” attorney, that is Jonathan Wharton. He responds quickly and effectively. Now, he is our first call for any legal solution because we know that he can handle the problem!
Mr. Wharton has a very strong sense of ethics and integrity, attention to detail and knows the law!  I highly recommend him to anyone that needs a lawyer they can trust!

Jonathan has been & continues to be consistently successful on my behalf. I pitched a  mortgage issue to several atty's. They were either not confident in their abilities, truly believed bankruptcy was my best option, or didn't feel comfortable going up against corporate lawyers.
Jonathan is confident, well versed in the law, & is the only attorney I will ever use. I feel comfortable recommending Jonathan Wharton to anyone needing legal help.

Jonathan has represented myself and our businesses in the past - with highly successful outcomes. Jonathan is an incredible attorney. Detail and outcome oriented he has a keen sense for justice and creating win -win scenarios. He is tough enough to get the job done, get it done quickly, while keeping the goal at the forefront of every action. Jonathan does not waist time (and billable hours) chasing meaningless actions and theories, he cuts like a laser to the heart of a problem to create a workable resolution. I would give Jonathan the highest recommendation to anyone looking for a fair and honest attorney.

Thank you, thank you, thank you 🙏

reviews.text: Nice people .. efficient and understanding .. competitively prices services..

I think Mike and Jill are great! I had finished my bankruptcy in 2012. I called them in 2024 with a big problem, and they solved it without delay. I can still reach out to them after all these years and get help. I would highly recommend them. Juanella P

I contacted Mike Wallace because my father had passed and he had an active bankruptcy case at the time of his death. I tried to reach out to the attorney that originally resided over my father's bankruptcy case but he was unwilling to help or answer any questions despite me offering to pay a consultation fee for his time. I just needed some questions answered but he said he couldn't help and was quite dismissive.

So I contacted Mike Wallace to see if anything could be done so that if possible, I could prevent any of my father's creditors from coming after his estate. Mr. Wallace was very accommodating and said that if I could get him a case number, he would look up my father's case and see what could be done. Mike & Jill texted me, they called me and even set up a time that I could call back and speak with him so that they could give me an update on what he had found out regarding my father's case.

Unfortunately in my situation, there was not much that could be done because too much time had passed but I will say that I'm very grateful that Mr. Wallace was willing to help me when the original attorney my dad hired in Sulphur Springs would not. Mr. Wallace wouldn't even accept a consultation fee for his time. As I mentioned above, sometimes even when you're willing to pay people to help you, they will not always help you but Mr. Wallace took the time and effort to look into the case and give me feedback regarding this particular matter. Even though there was not much that could be done because of the length of time that passed, it really is a huge relief when you can at least get some answers to the questions that you have.

If there was something in my particular case that could have been done, I would have moved forward with Mike Wallace's services because he was willing to help me, call, text and consult with me about what he had learned regarding my particular situation. Bankruptcy is a very sensitive matter regardless if it's tied to an estate or if you're in a situation where you may have to file but if you're looking for someone who will treat you with dignity and respect and not shove you off to voicemail, I would highly recommend that you give Mike or Jill Wallace a call so that they can help you. Thank you again for your help, Teresa

reviews.text: It was shear serendipity that I found Jill and Mike Wallace when I was in a dark cave not knowing how to get out or if I would ever get out. The last choice in life I ever thought I would have to make was to file bankruptcy. To me it was an admission of failure. But when my financial burdens continued to plague me without letting up, robbing me of sleep and the ability to perform my job to my satisfaction and stealing any joy that I should have in life, I started searching for a bankruptcy attorney to get some information, already convinced that I was most likely not going to qualify for bankruptcy and that fact would throw me into further despair. I met with two attorneys and left feeling even more overwhelmed and fearful that I could not even afford to file bankruptcy, or would have to quit my job and have no income at all before I could qualify for one of the types of bankruptcy.  Thankfully, I did not give up my search hoping surely there was some attorney out there that could show me the path that would work for me. I was so impressed by the level of kindness, empathy, knowledge and professionalism that I knew immediately that God had led me to the right place. They stayed in touch with me, keep me informed, told me what to expect and how the procedure would work. Mike was at the hearing and was there to calm me down and reassure me that I would  do fine. Today, it is all behind me, thanks to Mike and Jill Wallace. I have my life back. Thank you Jill and Mike.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for telling your story here. It means more to us than we could put into words.
